hero.title: Interactive Intelligence Research Cluster
hero.subtitle: Institute of Science Tokyo — Department of Computer Science
hero.lab_label: Institute of Science Tokyo — Dept. of Computer Science
hero.slogan:
Designing Intelligent Systems
That Augment Human Ability
hero.desc: We research human-computer interaction, machine learning, and 3D vision to build technologies that enhance how people learn, move, and create.

home.about_text: The Interactive Intelligence Research Cluster explores the intersection of human-computer interaction, artificial intelligence, and cognitive science. Our mission is to design intelligent systems that collaborate naturally with humans, augmenting human creativity and decision-making through novel interaction paradigms. We pursue fundamental research in interactive machine learning, multimodal interfaces, and human-AI collaboration, while also building practical systems that bring these ideas into the real world.

contact.access_text: 5-minute walk from Ookayama Station (Tokyu Meguro Line / Tokyu Oimachi Line)
